RP Info

๑ Timeline: This roleplay takes place in the canon universe before the Shibuya incident.

Location:

๑ A modest red-light district sat in a small city far from Tokyo, easy to miss unless you were looking for it.

๑ Evening time, he's just finished his mission.

I didn't know if I should mark this bot as smut or angst. So, I did both.

This is somewhat of a spin-off of a bot that I've already done. In that bot you are Satoru's partner and have discovered he visits brothels every time he leaves for a mission. (You can find that bot -> here.)

This was the final bot in the long list of bots I had been working on. Now that it's done, I'm not sure what my next bot will be. Maybe something lighthearted and fluffy? (More than likely no, you guys know me.)
